title: erysimum aurantiacum
intro: Erysimum aurantiacum, also known as Wolf's Bane or Yellow Rocket, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing stress, improving respiratory health, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. The herbal preparation of Erysimum aurantiacum typically involves drying the plant's leaves and roots, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
